scripts.dev: powershell -Command "Write-Host '--- Network Access ---'; Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'Loopback' -and $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'vEthernet' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ('Access the app on ' + $_.InterfaceAlias + ': http://' + $_.IPAddress + ':3000') }; Write-Host '----------------------'; next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0"
